title: Drugs beginning with D: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text: Dramamine Â® Chewable see Dimenhydrinate Dramamine Â® Less Drowsy see Meclizine Drisdol Â® see Ergocalciferol Dristan Â® Cold (as a combination product containing Chlorpheniramine Maleate, Acetaminophen, and Phenylephrine Hydrochloride) see Chlorpheniramine Dristan Cold Multi-Symptom Formula Â® (as a combination product containing Acetaminophen, Chlorpheniramine, Phenylephrine) see Phenylephrine Dristan Â® Nasal Spray see Oxymetazoline Nasal Spray Drixoral Â® (as a combination product containing Dexbrompheniramine, Pseudoephedrine) see Pseudoephedrine Drizalma Sprinkle Â® see Duloxetine Dronabinol Dronedarone Droxia Â® see Hydroxyurea Droxidopa Drymax Â® (as a combination product containing Chlorpheniramine, Methscopolamine, Pseudoephedrine) see Pseudoephedrine Dryphen Â® (as a combination product containing Acetaminophen, Chlorpheniramine, Phenylephrine) see Phenylephrine DSS see Stool Softeners DTaP see Diphtheria, Tetanus, and Pertussis (DTaP) Vaccine DTaP-HepB-IPV see Polio Vaccine DTaP-HepB-IPV see Hepatitis B Vaccine DTaP-HepB-IPV see Diphtheria, Tetanus, and Pertussis (DTaP) Vaccine DTaP-IPV see Polio Vaccine DTaP-IPV see Diphtheria, Tetanus, and Pertussis (DTaP) Vaccine DTaP-IPV/Hib see Polio Vaccine DTaP-IPV/Hib see Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) Vaccine DTaP-IPV/Hib see Diphtheria, Tetanus, and Pertussis (DTaP) Vaccine DTaP-IPV-Hib-HepB see Hepatitis B Vaccine DT
